reason: Disabling IPv6 router acceptance (net.ipv6.conf.all.accept_ra=0) is a standard sysctl hardening step that does not affect authentication, authorization, or filesystem layout. It only changes kernel networking behavior and is unlikely to cause lockout or service disruption unless the environment relies on IPv6 SLAAC via router advertisements.
estimated_impact: networking affected; May break IPv6 stateless address autoconfiguration (SLAAC) if the network depends on router advertisements for address assignment.; Could affect IPv6-based services that expect RA prefixes.
